codes.ADMIN_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_INVALID: This password reset link is invalid.
codes.ADMIN_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED: This password reset link has expired.

meta.title: Forgot admin password
meta.description: Request an admin password reset link.

request.title: Reset admin password
request.subtitle: Enter your admin email address and we will send a reset link if the account exists.
request.success: If that admin email exists, a password reset link has been sent.
request.help: For security, this page always returns the same result whether the email exists or not.

meta.title: Choose a new admin password
meta.description: Set a new password for your admin account.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Use a strong password you have not used for this admin account before.
reset.invalid: This password reset link is invalid.
reset.expired: This password reset link has expired. Request a new one.
reset.success: Your admin password has been updated. All existing sessions were signed out.
